##LOCALITY=Palermo #1 mine, near North Groton, Grafton County, New Hampshire, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Mark N. Feinglos

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
